title: Calendula officinalis (Calendula)
benefits_text: Calendula officinalis, commonly known as marigold, is a plant with impressive medicinal properties. It has the ability to speed up wound healing by promoting tissue regeneration and collagen production, which also aids in reducing the appearance of scars and stretch marks. Its anti-inflammatory properties help in reducing inflammation, easing menstrual cramps, and soothing diaper rash. Calendula also has antifungal and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating acne, eczema, and gastric ulcers, as well as reducing ear inflammation and protecting against dermatitis. Furthermore, it boosts the immune system, promotes oral health, alleviates sore throat, and fights fungal infections. Its soothing properties also help in treating sunburns, windburns, and reducing scars.
